task_description:
设计一个无畏契约(Valorant)战绩分析网页的主页设计图(PNG格式)。内容包括：顶部导航栏(Logo、菜单项如首页/战绩/排行榜/设置)、中央欢迎区域(大标题"无畏契约战绩分析"、副标题、搜索玩家的输入框)、下方特性卡片区域(展示至少3个核心功能：如"实时战绩"、"英雄数据"、"排位分析"等，每个卡片含图标、标题、描述)、页脚。设计风格现代专业，配色建议使用无畏契约游戏的蓝黑配色。保存到 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

args.query: Valorant无畏契约官方配色品牌色彩设计

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 设置画布和配色
width, height = 1920, 1280
bg_color = '#0F1419'  # 深蓝黑背景
primary_blue = '#00D4FF'  # 亮蓝
secondary_blue = '#1A1A2E'  # 深蓝
accent_red = '#FF4655'  # 红色
text_white = '#FFFFFF'  # 白色
text_gray = '#A3A3A3'  # 灰色

img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), bg_color)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 尝试加载系统字体
try:
    title_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 56)
    subtitle_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 32)
    nav_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 18)
    card_title_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 24)
    card_desc_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 14)
except:
    title_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    subtitle_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    nav_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    card_title_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    card_desc_font = ImageFont.load_default()

# ===== 1. 顶部导航栏 =====
nav_height = 80
# 导航背景
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, nav_height)], fill=secondary_blue)

# Logo
logo_text = "V"
draw.text((40, 20), logo_text, font=title_font, fill=accent_red)

# 导航菜单项
menu_items = ['首页', '战绩', '排行榜', '设置']
menu_x = 400
for idx, item in enumerate(menu_items):
    x_pos = menu_x + idx * 180
    color = primary_blue if idx == 0 else text_white
    draw.text((x_pos, 30), item, font=nav_font, fill=color)

# ===== 2. 中央欢迎区域 =====
welcome_y = 200

# 大标题
title = "无畏契约战绩分析"
title_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), title, font=title_font)
title_width = title_bbox[2] - title_bbox[0]
title_x = (width - title_width) // 2
draw.text((title_x, welcome_y), title, font=title_font, fill=primary_blue)

# 副标题
subtitle = "实时追踪你的战绩，分析英雄数据，登顶排位榜单"
subtitle_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), subtitle, font=subtitle_font)
subtitle_width = subtitle_bbox[2] - subtitle_bbox[0]
subtitle_x = (width - subtitle_width) // 2
draw.text((subtitle_x, welcome_y + 80), subtitle, font=subtitle_font, fill=text_gray)

# 搜索框
search_y = welcome_y + 180
search_box_height = 60
search_box_width = 500
search_x = (width - search_box_width) // 2

# 搜索框边框
draw.rectangle(
    [(search_x, search_y), (search_x + search_box_width, search_y + search_box_height)],
    outline=primary_blue,
    width=3
)

# 搜索框内文字
search_text = "输入玩家名称或ID搜索..."
draw.text((search_x + 20, search_y + 12), search_text, font=nav_font, fill=text_gray)

# ===== 3. 功能卡片区域 =====
card_start_y = search_y + 150
card_width = 320
card_height = 300
card_gap = 80
card_y_start = card_start_y

# 三个卡片的信息
cards = [
    {
        'title': '实时战绩',
        'desc': '实时更新你的最新比赛战绩，追踪KDA、胜率等核心数据',
        'icon': '📊'
    },
    {
        'title': '英雄数据',
        'desc': '深度分析各英雄的使用率、胜率、Pick数据统计',
        'icon': '🎮'
    },
    {
        'title': '排位分析',
        'desc': '详细的排位分布、天梯段位走势和对手分析'
    }
]

for idx, card in enumerate(cards):
    card_x = 120 + idx * (card_width + card_gap)
    
    # 卡片背景
    draw.rectangle(
        [(card_x, card_y_start), (card_x + card_width, card_y_start + card_height)],
        fill=secondary_blue,
        outline=primary_blue,
        width=2
    )
    
    # 卡片顶部颜色条
    draw.rectangle(
        [(card_x, card_y_start), (card_x + card_width, card_y_start + 8)],
        fill=accent_red if idx % 2 == 0 else primary_blue
    )
    
    # 图标
    icon = card.get('icon', '⭐')
    draw.text((card_x + 30, card_y_start + 30), icon, font=title_font, fill=primary_blue)
    
    # 卡片标题
    draw.text((card_x + 30, card_y_start + 110), card['title'], font=card_title_font, fill=text_white)
    
    # 卡片描述（折行处理）
    desc = card['desc']
    desc_lines = [desc[i:i+20] for i in range(0, len(desc), 20)]
    desc_y = card_y_start + 160
    for line in desc_lines:
        draw.text((card_x + 20, desc_y), line, font=card_desc_font, fill=text_gray)
        desc_y += 30

# ===== 4. 页脚 =====
footer_y = height - 80

# 页脚背景
draw.rectangle([(0, footer_y), (width, height)], fill=secondary_blue)

# 页脚文字
footer_text = "© 2026 Valorant Stats Tracker | Powered by Next-Gen Analytics"
footer_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), footer_text, font=nav_font)
footer_width = footer_bbox[2] - footer_bbox[0]
footer_x = (width - footer_width) // 2
draw.text((footer_x, footer_y + 25), footer_text, font=nav_font, fill=text_gray)

# 保存图片
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png'
img.save(output_path, 'PNG')
print(f'✓ 设计图已生成: {output_path}')
print(f'  分辨率: {width}x{height}px')
print(f'  文件大小: {os.path.getsize(output_path) / 1024:.1f} KB')

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 已获取无畏契约的官方品牌信息，现在需要生成实际的 PNG 设计图。我将使用 Python + PIL 库来绘制顶部导航、欢迎区域、功能卡片和页脚，采用无畏契约的典型蓝黑配色（#0F1419深蓝+#00D4FF亮蓝+#FF4655红色强调），最后保存到桌面。
